t.div: Your order has been submitted. Our team will process it shortly.
Your order has been submitted successfully.

div.p: No stock currently in the warehouse.

t.div: Your order has been submitted successfully.
Goods will be received at the 3PL warehouse. Please coordinate delivery timing with our team.

div.p: Delivery Contact (person to notify at destination)

t.div: Please select a file to upload.
Please select a file to upload.

tr.td: Order reference. Rows with same ref become one order.

div.p: * Either product_ref or product_name is required per line.
No stock age data available yet. Data is updated daily by the system.
To change your password or update your account details, contact your 3PL administrator.
